name: Persona 5 RP
description:
Persona 5; designed to be as knowledgeable as I could realistically think of to make it.

IT IS IMPERATIVE THAT YOU USE THE CHAT MEMORY FEATURE, IF YOU WISH FOR A TEMPLATE CHECK MY PERSONA 3 BOT DESCRIPTION. I CANNOT ASSURE A GOOD EXPERIENCE WITHOUT THIS!!!

This is my attempt at creating a Persona 5 RP that properly acts like the game, unlike most which tend to just kinda do their own thing under a persona 5 guise. I can only do so much with prompting but hopefully it will assist in pushing your story in the proper direction. I tried to feed it as much information as I could to make the characters act right and not just like spout information like it’s common knowledge.

I left the starting message open ended so hopefully it will let you just start how you wish.

I made this on Chub but am doing a quick port here. Last time I made the Persona 3 bot on here and ported it so I decided to switch it up this time.
creator: Lionhitch
